mcq.question: What is an IDE?
mcq.correct: Software used to write, test and debug programs
wrong: A type of computer hardware device
A storage system for program files
A programming language used in development

mcq.question: What does a code editor do?
mcq.correct: Allows programmers to write and edit code
wrong: Stores files on a hard drive

mcq.question: What is the purpose of a run-time environment?
mcq.correct: Allows programs to run and be tested
wrong: Stores data on a computer system

mcq.question: What does syntax highlighting do?
mcq.correct: Uses colours to make code easier to read
wrong: Fixes all errors in the program

mcq.question: What is auto-completion?
mcq.correct: Suggests code as the programmer types
wrong: Compiles the program into machine code

mcq.question: What is the benefit of error diagnostics?
mcq.correct: Helps identify and fix errors in code
